message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Need your consent on Task #1">
Task #1 needs your review for consensus. 6 of 8 reviewers have consented. Please read the changes in commit fe1009a (static/js/password-toggle.js and tests/api/register.rs) and send your consent or concerns.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already reviewed and sent my consent. Let me resend to make sure it was received.

input.content:
I already reviewed and consented to Task #1 in my previous message. Resending for clarity:

**I consent to Task #1 (fe1009a).**

The hidden input correctly preserves the `password_confirmation` field required by `RegisterFormData` (register.rs:36). The domain contract is intact -- no domain layer changes needed. The `input` event listener keeps the mirror in sync, and state transitions between show/hide modes are clean. Test coverage is present. No concerns.

content.text: Re-sent my consent to the team lead. I had already reviewed the commit and consented earlier, but it may not have been counted yet. Standing by for Task #2.
